infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nayl uses your camera so you can take photos to track your nail progress over time.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nayl accesses your photo library so you can choose photos to track your nail progress and set a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Nayl saves nail progress photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Nayl uses your microphone for guided meditation and relaxation audio features.

plugins.photosPermission: Nayl accesses your photo library so you can choose photos to track your nail progress and set a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Nayl uses your camera so you can take photos to track your nail progress over time.
